message.reasoning_content: We are asked to produce a JSON object. The fields to include: response (non-empty string), open_items (JSON objects), schedule_requests (must include purpose and requested_context, and requested_context entries may use {"tool":"recall", "record_id":"2128432f-91da-5390-bc37-ef3524daf956"}). We should not include policy_action on this cycle. We need exactly one open item with kind and text. Also schedule exactly one wake. So schedule_requests will have one entry with purpose and requested_context. The purpose should be something like "resolve the bounded follow-up item". We'll craft accordingly. The response string can be a brief acknowledgment. Let's ensure we output only the JSON object, no markdown fences, no prose, first char { and last char }.
